acquisition method: a targeted parallel reaction monitoring (PRM) method
alkylation reagent: derivatised by treatment with iodoacetamide to form stable carbamidomethyl derivatives
fragmentation method: acquire using an advanced peak determination (APD) algorithm in a higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) mode
instrument: ionised by electrospray ionisation using an Orbitrap-Fusion-Lumos Tribrid Mass Spectrometer
labeling: peptides were resolved by reverse phase chromatography
reduction reagent: with a final concentration of 100 mM DTT
reduction concentration: with a final concentration of 100 mM DTT
